name: Jova Creative Academy Attendance Register
description: A web-based student attendance register for Jova Creative Academy. This version synchronizes student names and attendance records with Firebase Firestore, ensuring data consistency across all devices. It features weekly attendance tracking, student management with removal options, and Firebase for class password management. Class names 'Class 7', 'Class 8', and 'Class 9' are correctly set to 'JHS 1', 'JHS 2', and 'JHS 3' respectively. All student and attendance data is now persisted in Firestore.
